name: Onion Marmalade#2
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp thinly sliced green onion with tops
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat all ingredients over low heat, stirring occasionally until the jelly is melted, about 10 minutes.
2. Cook, stirring often, for an additional 5 minutes.
3. Pour into a 1-cup container.
4. Cover and refrigerate no longer than one month.
